hero.badge: The New Standard in Modular Water Treatment
hero.title: Reliable Water Treatment
hero.desc: Modular filter housing systems in 5", 10" and 20" body sizes, single-to-quad configurations, for residential and commercial use. Dealer advantages, fast quotations and expert technical support all under one roof.

products.title: Our Products
products.desc: Professional water purification systems for homes, offices and industrial facilities

features.label: Why Euro Fil
features.title: We don't just sell devices
features.desc: From choosing the right product to spare parts, from periodic maintenance to 24/7 technical support — we are with you throughout.

ro.title: Modular Filter Housing Systems
ro.desc: We manufacture modular filtration systems in 5", 10" and 20" body sizes, in single, double, triple and quadruple configurations. Standard and gauge-equipped models deliver balanced flow and long-lasting performance for every need.

cert.title: Certified Quality & Trust
cert.desc: Euro Fil products are manufactured to quality standards and delivered with a reliable-use philosophy. With certified product structures, tested system solutions and technical compliance documentation, we provide a service process that gives our customers confidence.

scope.title: Systems Suited to Every Scale
scope.desc: From single-family homes to apartment buildings, restaurants to hotels, and small businesses to production facilities, we offer water filtration solutions tailored to different needs. We identify the right system for every project through correct product selection and technical guidance.

support.title: We're With You After the Sale, Too
support.desc: At Euro Fil, the process doesn't end with product delivery. We ensure your system runs efficiently for the long term through the right system selection, periodic maintenance support and after-sales technical support.
items: Expert Help Choosing the Right Product

steps.label: Process
steps.title: Getting Started with Euro Fil is Easy
steps.desc: From dealer price quote to uninterrupted support — a professional solution in 3 steps

items.title: Dealer Price Quote
items.desc: Fill out the contact form; our expert team will determine the right system and dealer price quote for your needs.

items.title: System Design
items.desc: Based on your request, a modular system proposal with the right body size and filter count is presented within 24 hours.

items.title: Ongoing Support
items.desc: Our 24/7 technical support line and spare parts supply keep your system performing at its best.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.desc: Find answers to your questions here.

items.q: How often does a water purification device need maintenance?
items.a: Euro Fil systems require periodic maintenance once a year. Filter replacement times vary between 6-12 months depending on water quality and usage. For replacement timing and the right filter choice, ask our technical support line.

items.q: Do you provide installation or assembly services?
items.a: No, we do not carry out installation or assembly. We supply our products through our dealer network and provide 24/7 technical support on product selection, specifications and use.

items.q: Which water sources is it suitable for?
items.a: We have solutions suitable for all types of water sources including municipal water, well water and borehole water. Our expert team identifies the most suitable system for your source and provides a custom dealer price quote.
All Euro Fil products are covered by a 2-year official warranty. For faults covered by the warranty, our 24/7 technical support line is always at your service.

items.q: What do I need to do to get a quote?
items.a: Simply fill out our contact form. A Euro Fil specialist will call you within 24 hours and present a customised dealer price quote. No upfront payment is required.

items.q: Do you have solutions for businesses that need higher flow capacity?
items.a: Yes. We can increase your capacity with triple and quad modular systems. We work with you to determine the ideal body size and configuration, and capacity calculations are free of charge.

cta.label: Dealer Network
cta.title: Get a
cta.desc: Through our dealer network, Euro Fil offers the modular filtration system best suited to your needs — in 5", 10" and 20" body sizes, single-to-quad configurations — along with a price quote.

assurances.title: Fast Price Quote
assurances.desc: Fill out the form and we'll send you a custom dealer price quote within 24 hours — no upfront payment required.

assurances.title: Expert Technical Guidance
assurances.desc: Settle the housing size and stage count with our specialists so you pick the right system.

assurances.title: 2-Year Warranty + 24/7 Support
assurances.desc: 2-year factory warranty on all products. Our 24/7 technical support line is at your service in case of any issues.

contactPage.desc: Fill out the form for a dealer price quote or technical support. Our experts will get back to you within 24 hours.

seo.title: About
seo.description: Euro Fil is the 2025-launched sub-brand of Filtek, a water treatment manufacturer since 2004. It exports to 45 countries and is produced in Arnavutköy, İstanbul.

hero.desc: Under the Filtek group, Euro Fil designs and manufactures TSE-certified water treatment systems for homes, offices and industrial facilities. We set out in 2025 and today we export to 45 countries.

about.label: About Us
about.title: A young brand from a deep-rooted manufacturer
paragraphs: Filtek Filtre ve Su Arıtma Sistemleri Sanayi A.Ş. has worked in the water treatment sector since 2004. On starting production in 2009 it became Turkey's first domestic and pioneering manufacturer, and it has never paused its investment since.
In 2020 Filtek founded Turkey's first domestic water treatment tank factory under the TR Tank name. As one of the few manufacturers of its kind worldwide, it leads in water treatment tank production.

Our main factory and our TR Tank factory are located in Arnavutköy, İstanbul; the main factory covers 16,000 m² and the TR Tank factory 4,000 m². We manufacture with 400 employees and carry on through our regional offices and flagship sales stores.
Euro Fil is Filtek's sub-brand, launched in 2025. Backed by that manufacturing base, Euro Fil today exports to 45 countries.

manifesto.quote: Water treatment isn't a product, it's a responsibility. We design every system as if it were going into our own home.

vision.title: Vision
vision.desc: As Filtek Filtre ve Su Arıtma Sistemleri Sanayi A.Ş., we hold our strong position in the domestic market. Our vision is to lead water treatment production and supply, both in Turkey and abroad.

mission.title: Mission
mission.desc: As Filtek, we keep investing without slowing down. Our mission is to be known as the most trusted company in our sector and to add value to the national economy.

items.title: Quality and Continuity
items.desc: The superior quality of our products and their continuous improvement is our priority.

items.title: Relationship-Driven Approach
items.desc: Our customers, our brand and our employees are the assets we value most; we hold to the principle of adding value for them.

items.title: Occupational Health and Environmental Care
items.desc: Occupational health and safety together with environmental care are a priority at the foundation of everything we do.

items.title: Business Ethics
items.desc: We adhere strictly to the principles of business ethics, and we value integrity and honesty.

items.title: People-Centred Human Resources
items.desc: Valuing labour and people supports the success and wellbeing of our employees.

standards.label: Our Standards
standards.title: Quality Is Checked at Every Stage

cta.desc: Let's determine the ideal system for your needs through our dealer network and provide a custom price quote.
